inputs.label: Pet Weight
inputs.businessContext: The weight of the pet in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The weight of the pet in kilograms.

inputs.label: Activity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for activity level (e.g., 1.2 for sedentary, 1.5 moderate, 1.8 active).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for activity level (e.g., 1.2 for sedentary, 1.5 moderate, 1.8 active).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktivite seviyesi çarpanı (örn. hareketsiz için 1.2, orta için 1.5, aktif için 1.8).

inputs.label: Caloric Density
inputs.businessContext: Energy density of the food in kilocalories per kilogram (common for dry food: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy density of the food in kilocalories per kilogram (common for dry food: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mamanın kilogram başına kilokalori cinsinden enerji yoğunluğu (kuru mama için yaygın: 3000-4000 kcal/kg).

inputs.label: Meals Per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of meals the pet eats daily.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of meals the pet eats daily.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Evcil hayvanın günlük yediği öğün sayısı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
